content.description:
A group of radio buttons for single-selection from static options, for use in app-pages.

### Content Fields

- `label` (string) - Group heading label
- `options` (array) - Array of `{ value, label }` objects
- `defaultValue` (string) - Value selected on initial render
- `stateKey` (string) - Key to write selected value to in page state
- `layout` (string) - `vertical` (default) or `horizontal`
